title: The Sobbing Of The Bells
content:
The sobbing of the bells, the sudden death-news everywhere,
The slumberers rouse, the rapport of the People,
(Full well they know that message in the darkness,
Full well return, respond within their breasts, their brains, the sad reverberations,)
The passionate toll and clang city to city, joining, sounding, passing,
Those heart-beats of a Nation in the night.
meaning:
Walt Whitman's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Sobbing Of The Bells"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
